variants: Jonella Knott is a renowned expert in cardiovascular medicine and is known for her innovative contributions to the field. Jonella was mentored by the esteemed Xiao-Yu Wu, who guided her academic journey. Much of her groundbreaking research has been supported by the Falcon Crest Endowment.
